data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement that a backup is activated if the primary is unavailable. However, the evidence does not confirm that the system has a mechanism in place to activate a backup lead when the primary is unavailable, as it only describes the scenario without demonstrating the actual behavior or state of the system in such a case. The linked use case mentions the backup lead activation but lacks concrete evidence of this functionality being tested or validated in the prior steps.
gaps: No evidence showing that the backup lead is activated when the primary is unavailable.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
